title: Referencing Name from Creation Log for Automations
excerpt: I’m trying to automate a message to slack that uses the creators name from the creation log but every time I do, it uses the date (@April 7 2025 18:36). How do I pull just the creators name. I already have only the creat…

posts.author: MeghanCastro (Meghan)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to automate a message to slack that uses the creators name from the creation log but every time I do, it uses the date (@April 7 2025 18:36). How do I pull just the creators name. I already have only the creator shown and not the date in the column.
